All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AggregateMetric<T>
An aggregate metric is a metric for a set of measurements, added with Addable.add(Object)
AggregateQuantumMetric<T extends com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.numeric.Quantizable>
A quantum aggregate metric is an AggregateMetric for arbitrary Quantizable objects.

AverageCountMetric
 
AverageDurationMetric
 
AverageMetric<T extends com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.numeric.Quantizable>
 
AverageRateMetric
 
BaseMetric<T>
Base class for metrics.
ConsoleMetricsReporter
 
DoubleMetric
 
MaximumBytesMetric
 
MaximumCountMetric
 
MaximumDurationMetric
 
MaximumMetric<T extends com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.numeric.Quantizable>
 
MaximumRateMetric
 
Metric<T>
A named measurement CreatedAt.createdAt() at some point in time
Metric.MetricType
 
MetricsReporter
Reports a series of measurements via MetricsReporter.report(Metric)
MinimumBytesMetric
 
MinimumCountMetric
 
MinimumDurationMetric
 
MinimumMetric<T extends com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.numeric.Quantizable>
 
MinimumRateMetric
 
NullMetricsReporter
A MetricsReporter that does nothing
QuantumMetric<T extends com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.numeric.Quantizable>
A quantum metric is a single measurement (as opposed to an AggregateMetric) with a BaseMetric.name(), BaseMetric.type(), BaseMetric.unit(), BaseMetric.description() and measurement().
TotalBytesMetric
 
TotalCountMetric
 
TotalMetric<T extends com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.numeric.Quantizable>
